![Opto 22 Logo](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/opto22_lightsilvergradient_800px.png "Opto 22 Logo")

# OptoBlog

# OptoBlog

## [Get real-time visibility into the Amazon jungle](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/get-real-time-visibility-into-the-amazon-jungle)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/AutomationEcuadorarticle.png)

### New *Control Global* article shows you how to automate process data collection and monitoring in highly isolated locations.

Have you ever thought it would be possible to move data from the Amazon jungle to the cloud?

You can see a real working example of how it was achieved with Ignition Edge software, *groov* RIO hardware, and Azure Cloud. Get all the details in Jim Montague's recent article in *Control Global*.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[Ignition Edge](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/ignition-edge),
[OptoPartner](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/optopartner),
[groov RIO](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio),
[SCADA](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/scada)

## [From "old school" to completely scalable solutions](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/from-old-school-to-completely-scalable-solutions)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/RidgeHarvest-422-1.png)

### Ridge Vineyards explains how to go from manual system checks to new automated control systems that integrate seamlessly with existing equipment.

Are maintenance issues disrupting your day-to-day operations? Are manual "old school" systems causing unplanned shutdowns?

It's a common scenario in many industries, but Opto 22's new case study involves an agricultural application that needed an automated, scalable, reliable solution.

Learn how Ridge Vineyards gave its operators real-time control and remote monitoring of its wastewater processes.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[groov View](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-view),
[groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-epic)

## [Unifying over 100 machines with live data in a Unified Namespace (UNS)](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/unifying-over-100-machines-with-live-data-in-a-unified-namespace-uns)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/moriroku_partpainter_1200.png)

### New case study demonstrates how you can overcome outdated reporting systems and the challenge of getting live data from legacy equipment.

Are manual processes and human errors limiting your visibility and insights into your production performance? Are you dealing with a variety of machines with different control hardware for each?

Moriroku® Technology North America (MTNA) was facing all those challenges and decided it was time for a digital transformation initiative to enhance resilience, efficiency, and competitiveness.

See what they learned along the way, and how their "start small" philosophy resulted in huge gains.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[Ignition](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/ignition),
[groov RIO](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio),
[digital transformation](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/digital-transformation),
[smart manufacturing](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/smart-manufacturing)

## [Preventing a data center shutdown](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/preventing-a-data-center-shutdown)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/ATM-422.png)

### Are your systems able to withstand severe weather threats or power failures? Learn how a nationwide bank restored critical cooling without infrastructure changes.

Have your industrial control systems been put to the test? Do you have monitoring and control mechanisms in place to face a natural disaster?

After an HVAC retrofit in 2022, the headquarters of a nationwide bank in Australia encountered an unplanned shutdown of their data center, which was critical to their banking operations. Learn how they quickly bounced back, despite facing strict regulations, time constraints, and a list of new required system features.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-epic),
[system integrator](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/system-integrator),
[groov rio emu](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio-emu),
[data center](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/data-center)

## [groov + Ignition = a powerful college classroom combo](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/groov-ignition-powerful-college-classroom-combo)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/ClovisCollegeCaseStudyIALab.png)

### See why *groov* RIO edge I/O with Ignition Edge has become a key component to college Industry 4.0 labs and preparing students for real-world applications.

Have you wondered what a modern day college engineering lab is equipped with for today's students? What's the latest technology that's needed to prepare students for careers in industrial automation? Is it the same technology you're researching for your projects?

Inductive Automation explores the classroom in their latest case study featuring Clovis Community College. You'll learn why Ignition software pairs well with Opto 22 *groov* devices to meet the challenges of today's IIoT applications, as well as exceeding educational expectations.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[IIoT](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/iiot),
[industrial automation](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/industrial-automation),
[groov RIO](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio),
[Inductive Automation](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/inductive-automation)

## [Optimizing energy management in heat treatment](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/optimizing-energy-management-in-heat-treatment)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/social-suggested-images/info.opto22.comhubfsgroovRIO-EMU_Wires_800-2.png)

### See how Schulman Engineering addressed their energy usage, analyzed costs, and established preventive maintenance with the *groov* RIO energy monitoring unit.

Are you working on machine health initiatives and predictive maintenance? Do you want to track (and reduce) operating costs? Energy management can be the key to achieving these goals. 

Schulman Engineering, an industrial automation and system integration company located in Southern California, recently shared a client success story using Opto 22's *groov* RIO EMU ([GRV-R7-I1VAPM-3](https://www.opto22.com/products/product-container/grv-r7-i1vapm-3)).

Is it possible to find a secure solution that translates energy data into usable information for cost management, process improvement, and equipment reliability?

Topics:
[Energy management](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/energy-management),
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[system integrator](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/system-integrator),
[groov rio emu](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio-emu),
[energy monitoring](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/energy-monitoring)

## [OEM achieves real-time data, predictive diagnostics, and remote access](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/oem-achieves-real-time-data-predictive-diagnostics-and-remote-access)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/cryotherapy-chambers_6x3_144dpi.jpg)

### Learn from this new case study as CryoPhit USA explains how they overcame the complexity of cryotherapy systems with an advanced automated solution.

CryoPhit USA needed to design a system that was easy to use, maintain, and service, ensuring accessibility for end users, operators, and refrigeration technicians. This meant access to real-time data would be key. Sound familiar?

In this case study, find out how the *groov* RIO provided real-time data, predictive diagnostics, and remote access for their innovative cryochambers.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[OEM](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/oem),
[groov RIO](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-rio)

## [How to upgrade SCADA for unmatched efficiency](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/how-to-upgrade-scada-for-unmatched-efficiency)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/WheelerRidge.png)

### Is your SCADA system holding you back? See how the Wheeler Ridge-Maricopa Water Storage District fixed their outdated systems.

If you’re managing critical infrastructure, **how much do you trust your SCADA system?** Are you getting real-time, reliable data, or are you constantly battling delays, communication failures, and rising maintenance costs?

Wheeler Ridge-Maricopa Water Storage District faced those same challenges—until they partnered with [Avadine](https://www.opto22.com/community/opto-partners/avadine), an IoT-certified OptoPartner, to upgrade their SCADA system. Read about their new solution and how they got there.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-epic),
[Ignition](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/ignition),
[OptoPartner](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/optopartner)

## [Increasing profitability with Ignition, Factory Stack, and groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/increasing-profitability-with-ignition-factory-stack-and-groov-epic)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/IACaseStudy_Riveron_GlassManuf.png)

### Learn the powerful results you can achieve when using Ignition, *groov*EPIC, and 4IR Solutions' Factory Stack™ cloud platform together.

As shown in a [recent webinar](/optoblog/teaming-up-to-enable-digital-transformation-and-a-unified-namespace-uns) here on the OptoBlog, Inductive Automation often brings together its solutions partners (including Opto 22) to demonstrate complete solution packages.

When using collaborative technologies, you see increased benefits—including an easier path to digital transformation and finally getting the data you need, where you need it.

This Inductive Automation case study is an excellent example of how using a combined solution allowed a glass company to achieve a lean manufacturing goal with a unified reporting system, along with increased efficiency in production.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-epic),
[Ignition](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/ignition),
[manufacturing](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/manufacturing)

## [Simplifying access to many systems with one interface](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/simplifying-access-to-many-systems-with-one-interface)

![](https://blog.opto22.com/hubfs/morro-bay-sunset-marina1200.png)

### Learn from the City of Morro Bay's dynamic operations and see how your systems could be adapted for real-time data.

Managing multiple control systems doesn’t have to be a headache. When Operational Technology Specialist Grant Chase went to work in Morro Bay, California, he found a utilities infrastructure in need of unification and stability. 

The city’s water and wastewater control systems were a patchwork of different technologies—some dating back decades.

Grant was determined to rebuild a standardized operation with key security controls in place to protect critical infrastructure. See how edge controller technology played a prominent role in getting operators working smoothly on one platform to visualize data across all processes.

Topics:
[Case studies](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/case-studies),
[Ignition Edge](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/ignition-edge),
[groov View](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-view),
[groov EPIC](https://blog.opto22.com/optoblog/topic/groov-epic)

enriched_points.expanded_content: Successful integrations include Deutsche Bahn's IoT systems for real-time monitoring, and Ridge Vineyards' automated control for efficient wastewater management.
Innovations like Moosaik's moss wall panels enhance urban air quality, showcasing the diverse applications of optoelectronic devices in environmental monitoring.
Key takeaways emphasize the importance of seamless integration, data accessibility, and the need for scalable solutions to enhance operational efficiency.
The future of optoelectronic device integration lies in advancing smart city applications and improving energy management, driving sustainability and operational excellence.
